required_elements.element: Did the suspect use firearms during the incident that occurred?
Did the suspect use firearms in previous incidents?
Did the suspect make threats— real or implied— to use firearms during the incident that occurred?
Did the suspect make threats— real or implied— to use firearms in previous incidents?
Does the suspect have access to firearms? If so, what are the details of the firearms? Where are they located?
Did the victim express fear about the suspect’s access to firearms? If so, how was this captured in the report?
Were firearms/weapons confiscated? If so, on what grounds?
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence?
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a qualifying order of protection?
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to dishonorable discharge from the military?
Is the relationship of the parties identified?
What is the history of the relationship? (include frequency of any violence, intimidation, and threats)
Were all witnesses interviewed and documented?
Were weapons/objects used?
What was the emotional state of the victim (what did they report they were thinking and feeling)?
What evidence was collected?
Is evidence of fear articulated in the report?
Have all threats been clearly documented?
Are stalking behaviors identified? (e.g. following, repeated calling, sending unwanted gifts)
Is the use of coercion and/or force articulated?
Have all injuries (visible and non-visible) been documented? Were injuries existing or new?
Was there any property damage? Theft? Burglary?
Did the victim report being strangled (“choked”)? If so, was it described in detail?
Did the victim need medical attention?
Were all spontaneous statements captured and documented?
Was information provided to the victim about local service providers?
Was a threat/risk assessment tool used with the victim?
Did the officer gather comprehensive information about the suspect?
Was an arrest made?
What was the emotional state of the suspect (what did they report they were thinking and feeling)?
Was a threat/risk assessment tool used with the suspect?
Was the proper protocol followed if the suspect was not on the scene?
Are there any active warrants out for the suspect?
Has the suspect been the respondent to a protection order in the past?
Is the time of the call recorded (including time of incident, time of dispatch, time of arrival)?
Is the scene concisely described/diagramed?
Were photos taken and details recorded?
Are the elements of the crime(s) articulated to meet state and/or federal laws?
